product.name: BriefLoop
product.description: A traceable, accountable workflow for AI-assisted business briefings.
product.boundary: Traceability and process accountability; not semantic proof.
product.release_status: v0.14.0 published; official Git tag and non-draft GitHub Release verified

cli.scope: The v0.14.0 bootstrap uses the canonical source checkout. New runs support only the Experimental Codex SQLite path; the CLI does not generate a brief by itself.

package_index.instruction: Do not choose pipx or PyPI installation from package metadata. Follow the installation reference until release notes announce a published and smoke-tested package-index artifact.

codex_runtime_kit.scope: Packaged Codex runtime kit for the Experimental fresh SQLite-only path.

runtime_policy.authority: briefloop.db SQLite ControlStore receipts and ledger relations
runtime_policy.projections: Legacy JSON control files and report status handoff finalize Quality Panel Markdown JSON JSONL and HTML exports are non-authoritative projections
runtime_policy.strict_json_carriers: Action envelope and human-request JSON payloads are revalidated against ControlStore and are not authority by themselves
runtime_policy.laj: Experimental advisory only; utility and efficacy NOT MEASURED
runtime_policy.improvement_ledger: unavailable; no automatic learning or accepted-suggestion next-run effect
